56668.title: Non-Stop 80s Hits!
56668.description: We got hits... We got hits from the 80s. And guess what? They don't stop! IT'S WHAT IT SAYS ON THE TIN! You're welcome!

56669.title: Gold! Greatest Hits Of The 80s
56669.description: Pencil us in because we've organised the greatest hits of the '80s for you...you're welcome!

56670.title: I Want My MTV 80s!
56670.description: It's '80s month here at MTV and we're saluting big hair, power suits and a decade of pure pop icons. It's non-stop nostalgia right here at MTV 80s!

56671.title: Forever 80s
56671.description: Check out all of the best hits from one of the biggest decades in music!

56672.title: Who's That 80s Girl?
56672.description: A selection of the greatest hits from favourite girls of the 80s!

56673.title: Greatest 80s Rock: Play It Loud!
56673.description: Hard! Alternative! Heavy! Post-punk! Metal! Indie! Goth! Call it what you want, but turn up the volume as we delve into the decade's best rock tracks in all their incarnations, right here on MTV!

56674.title: ... So 80s!
56674.description: Get ready because we're bringing you nothing but classic hits and iconic anthems from the 80s!
